summary: Remove Governance Poll Requirement For SparkLend Parameter Changes
description: Removes the requirement for a Governance Poll before modifying SparkLend Liquidation Threshold and Liquidation Bonus parameters, allowing these changes to proceed directly to an Executive Vote via the Operational Weekly Cycle.
